summary: Apply review-driven hardening for the runtime production readiness stack.
rationale: The final fw-review pass found small cross-layer drift and coverage gaps around production API projection, prompt safety boundaries, CTS request/response contracts, protected-attribute policy sharing, mock CTS constants, and Liepin SSE stream constants. Keeping these changes in a dedicated top-of-stack slice preserves the earlier docs-only stack-gate PR while making the review hardening explicit.
verification: uv run pytest tests/test_prompt_safety.py tests/test_api_production_contract.py tests/test_cts_client_split.py tests/test_cts_provider_adapter.py tests/test_runtime_multi_source_round_dispatch.py tests/test_filter_projection.py tests/test_cts_source_compiler.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py tests/test_llm_input_prompts.py -q

uv run ruff check src/seektalent/protected_attributes.py src/seektalent/cts_filter_policy.py src/seektalent/api.py src/seektalent/clients/cts_mock_client.py src/seektalent/clients/cts_request.py src/seektalent/controller/react_controller.py src/seektalent/reflection/critic.py src/seektalent/runtime/constraints.py src/seektalent/scoring/scorer.py src/seektalent/sources/cts/filter_projection.py src/seektalent_ui/liepin_routes.py tests/test_api_production_contract.py tests/test_cts_client_split.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py tests/test_prompt_safety.py

uv run ty check src/seektalent/protected_attributes.py src/seektalent/cts_filter_policy.py src/seektalent/api.py src/seektalent/clients/cts_mock_client.py src/seektalent/clients/cts_request.py src/seektalent/controller/react_controller.py src/seektalent/reflection/critic.py src/seektalent/runtime/constraints.py src/seektalent/scoring/scorer.py src/seektalent/sources/cts/filter_projection.py src/seektalent_ui/liepin_routes.py tests/test_api_production_contract.py tests/test_cts_client_split.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py tests/test_prompt_safety.py
uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: duplicated CTS native filter allowlist literals
unnamed review-sensitive timing and scoring constants
risks: This slice intentionally spans several layers because it collects review fixes that would otherwise contaminate earlier scoped PRs.
The runtime constraints file is touched only to re-export the shared protected-attribute policy.
The production contract file is touched only to fail closed when selected source coverage is absent.
